backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user management, custom links, and vault notes with role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin. Provides CRUD operations for user profiles, custom links, and encrypted vault notes, gated by principal authentication checks.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs to their implementation files, related components, and test IDs for features including useActorReady hook, useQueries gating, ProtectedRoute state machine, and other frontend authentication/authorization improvements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes made to components, hooks, pages, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the AstraVault React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up TanStack Router with protected and public routes, wraps the app in React Query, and uses an AuthGuard to show a full-page loader during identity initialization before redirecting authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Collapsible sidebar component rendering navigation links, default link categories, and user-defined custom links grouped by category, with a custom link manager modal trigger.
frontend/src/components/CustomLinkManage: A dialog-based UI component for managing custom links, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with form validation, icon selection, and custom category support.
A simple footer component displaying developer attribution and a caffeine.ai referral link with the current year.
The top navigation header with a sidebar toggle, logo, secure connection indicator, and a user profile dropdown menu with logout functionality.
The main dashboard layout shell that composes the header, collapsible sidebar, background-textured main content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountCon: An alert dialog that requires the user to type 'DELETE' to confirm permanent account deletion, then clears the query cache and logs out.
frontend/src/components/IconPicker.tsx: A searchable grid icon picker component that filters available icons by name and highlights the currently selected one.
frontend/src/components/LogoutConfirmati: A simple alert dialog asking the user to confirm logout before invoking the provided onConfirm callback.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A full-page modal form for new users to register by providing name, username, email, and a vault password, which is hashed before being sent to the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Guards protected routes by checking Internet Identity authentication, actor readiness, and profile existence, rendering loading/error states or a profile setup modal as needed before rendering child routes.
frontend/src/data/defaultLinks.ts: Defines default bookmark link categories (banks, email, investments, services, payments) with associated icons and URLs, plus an icon map for dynamic icon lookup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing it when the identity changes and invalidating dependent queries on actor updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorReady.ts: Derives a stable `isActorReady` boolean that is true only when identity initialization is complete, the user is authenticated, and the actor is available and not fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposing identity state and status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data operations including profile fetching, user registration/update, custom links, and vault notes CRUD mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS with a military-themed dark color palette using OKLCH custom properties, Tailwind base/utilities, and custom utility classes for gold and military-green tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Renders the main dashboard with a welcome banner, stat cards (quick links, custom links, vault notes), and a quick-access grid, fetching data via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Displays the AstraVault login screen with branding and a button to authenticate via Internet Identity using the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page with sections for changing vault password, toggling email 2FA, updating user profile, and deleting the account, using various React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/VaultPage.tsx: Encrypted notes vault page that requires password unlock before showing notes; supports adding, editing, deleting, and searching notes with client-side AES-256-GCM encryption.
frontend/src/utils/encryption.ts: Provides client-side AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt functions for vault notes using PBKDF2 key derivation, plus a SHA-256 password hashing utility, all via the Web Crypto API.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the AstraVault frontend, defining dark mode, custom color tokens (gold, military green, surface), fonts (Rajdhani, Inter), border radius, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 17) describing AstraVault's architecture, existing features, known issues, and planned work items for a military-themed full-stack dashboard with React/Node.js, JWT auth, AES-256 vault encryption, and Indian financial service links.
